basic_details.job_title: NIEPID Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Accounts Officer, Driver and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute for the Empowerment of Persons with Intellectual Disabilities (Divyangjan) (NIEPID)
basic_details.post_name: Rehabilitation Officer, Accounts Officer, Driver, Catering Assistant, Deputy Director (Administration)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute for the Empowerment of Persons with Intellectual Disabilities (Divyangjan) (NIEPID) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 05 Driver, Accounts Officer and More Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline through the official NIEPID website. The last date to submit the application form is 11-05-2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 30 to 56 years depending on the post
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 30 to 56 years depending on the post. Relaxation in upper age limit is applicable as per the norms of GOI to SC/ST/OBC/PH/Ex-Servicemen/employees already working in Central Government Departments for regular posts.

qualification.details: Rehabilitation Officer: Post graduate degree in Social Work / Rehabilitation Work / Sociology / Psychology or equivalent from a recognized University with DVTE (MR) / DVR (MR) and six years experience in Vocational training and guidance. Accounts Officer: Degree of a recognized University with at least 5 years' experience as Section Officer (Audit & Accounts), Jr. Accounts Officer, Civil Accounts Officer in Central Govt. / autonomous body / Public Undertaking. Driver: 10th standard/SSC or equivalent, valid HMV driving license, knowledge of motor mechanism, and minimum 3 years of driving experience. Catering Assistant: Matriculation or Equivalent with 2 years catering experience in a Govt. or Non-Govt. establishment. Deputy Director (Administration): Post Graduate Degree / Diploma in Personnel Management / Industrial Relations / Management / Public Administration / Arts / Science / Commerce with 10 years’ experience in personnel matters and office management.

selection_process: Short-listing of candidates by a duly constituted Screening Committee Interview/Written Test (for Group A posts) Merit based selection (for Group B & C posts
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIEPID Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 11-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIEPID recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the completed offline application form for the various posts at NIEPID is 11 May 2026. Candidates are advised to send their applications well in advance to avoid postal delays.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are released by NIEPID?
faq.answer: NIEPID has released a total of 5 vacancies for various positions, including Rehabilitation Officer, Accounts Officer, Driver, Catering Assistant, and Deputy Director (Administration) in this recruitment cycle.

faq.question: Q3. Is the application process online or offline?
faq.answer: The application process for NIEPID recruitment 2026 is strictly offline. Interested candidates must download the application form, fill it out, and send it to the official address via post before the deadline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for General candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 500/-. Candidates belonging to SC, ST, and Women categories are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the posts ranges from 30 to 56 years depending on the specific position. Age relaxation is provided as per the Government of India norms for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for Group B and C posts?
faq.answer: For Group B and C posts, the selection will be based on merit. There will be no interview conducted for these specific categories, as per the official notification guidelines.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for the Deputy Director (Administration) post?
faq.answer: For the Deputy Director (Administration) post, the salary is Level-12 in the 7th CPC pay matrix for deputation, or a consolidated remuneration of Rs. 1,22,000/- per month for contractual appointments.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any specific qualifications for the Driver post?
faq.answer: Yes, for the Driver post, candidates must have passed 10th standard/SSC, possess a valid HMV driving license, have knowledge of motor mechanisms, and hold at least 3 years of driving experience.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the NIEPID office located?
faq.answer: The National Institute for the Empowerment of Persons with Intellectual Disabilities (Divyangjan) is located in Secunderabad, Telangana, with the pincode 500009.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply for multiple posts?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply for multiple posts if they meet the eligibility criteria for each, but they must submit separate application forms and pay the required fees for each post as applicable.
